# joinNames

**Type Property**

Typically, multiple-word names will be returned as multiple tokens, following the standard tokenization practice of the tagger.

## Declaration

```swift
static var joinNames: NLTagger.Options { get }
```

## Discussion

If this option is set, then multiple-word names will be joined together and returned as a single token.

## Constants

- **omitWords**: Omit tokens of type [doc://com.apple.naturallanguage/documentation/NaturalLanguage/NLTag/word] (items considered to be words).
- **omitPunctuation**: Omit tokens of type [doc://com.apple.naturallanguage/documentation/NaturalLanguage/NLTag/punctuation] (all punctuation).
- **omitWhitespace**: Omit tokens of type [doc://com.apple.naturallanguage/documentation/NaturalLanguage/NLTag/whitespace] (whitespace of all sorts).
- **omitOther**: Omit tokens of type [doc://com.apple.naturallanguage/documentation/NaturalLanguage/NLTag/other] (non-linguistic items, such as symbols).
- **joinContractions**: Contractions will be returned as one token.
